finding: the ~80% residual does NOT compress to surah-topic (surah conditioning is 0.42 bits WORSE than global frequency) — it is ~100% irreducible lexical specificity at the per-ayah level; a faint real topical signal exists (beats the surah-shuffle null) but is lexical and sub-compressing

sources.irreducible_lexical: the specific root identity not predictable from any frequency
sources.surah_topical_signal: real (beats shuffle null) but does not compress the residual

surah_topical_signal_note: per-surah conditioning is WORSE than global frequency (gain -0.419 bits) — sparse per-surah marginals over 1642 roots cannot beat the better-estimated global frequency; so the residual does NOT compress to surah-topic.
